import Header from "./Header.js"; import List from "./Data.js"; import { useState } from "react"; function App() { const[taskList , setTaskList]=useState(List) const remove = (taskId) => { const id = (taskList.findIndex((task) => { return task.Sno == taskId}))+1 taskList.slice(id,1); set } return <>
